description: Direct product experience sharing where the creator showcases a specific item or menu offering with casual personal commentary and brand mentions, inviting audience recognition and discussion.
structural_recipe: Post a close-up or lifestyle photo of the product (beverage, food item). Lead with a casual question or statement about trying/testing the product ('جرّبت...'). Include product-specific details (flavor, appearance, temperature). Tag the brand name prominently. Add relevant hashtags that mix brand identity with community/relatable phrases. Optional: use emojis that reinforce the product category (☕ for beverages, ❄️ for cold items).
why_it_works: Saudi audiences respond to peer recommendations and authentic first-hand experiences. The casual interrogative format ('جرّبت؟' - 'Did you try?') creates immediacy and invites personal validation from followers who may have also experienced the product. Brand tagging with community hashtags (#مننا_ويفهم_جونا) builds tribal belonging and positions the creator as a relatable insider rather than a distant influencer.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure product claims are factual; Saudi audiences and regulators scrutinize health/quality claims in F&B content
Brand partnership disclosure may be legally required; undisclosed sponsored reviews risk regulatory backlash
Avoid comparisons to competitor products unless explicitly authorized by featured brand
Product quality must match visual presentation; misrepresentation damages trust in tight-knit Saudi communities
cultural_constraints: Avoid alcohol-adjacent beverages or food items during Ramadan
Ensure gendered product positioning aligns with local sensibilities
Use Arabic-first captions; English should be secondary or absent
